_comment: Tests multi-term query ranking: docs with both 'wireless' and 'earbuds' in title should outscore docs with only one term; also exercises stop-word removal (e.g. 'with'), TF saturation via repeated terms in SKU-008, and length normalization across short titles vs long descriptions.

documents.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Wireless Earbuds with Noise Cancelling
documents.body: Industry-leading noise cancelling wireless earbuds. Up to 8 hours battery life with noise cancelling on. IPX4 water resistant. Multipoint connection for two devices.

documents.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Generation Wireless Earbuds
documents.body: Active noise cancellation removes background noise. Adaptive Transparency lets outside sound in. Personalised Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking.

documents.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro Wireless Earbuds
documents.body: 360 audio with head tracking. Intelligent active noise cancellation. IPX7 water resistant. 29 hours total battery with case.

documents.title: Anker Soundcore P3i Wireless Earbuds
documents.body: Hybrid active noise cancellation with 4 microphones. 10mm drivers for deep bass. 30 hours playtime. IPX5 water resistance. Transparency mode.

documents.title: Bose QuietComfort 45 Wireless Headphones
documents.body: Over-ear wireless headphones with world-class noise cancellation. 24 hours battery. Aware mode for letting in outside sound. Comfortable around-ear fit.

documents.title: JBL Tune 510BT Wireless On-Ear Headphones
documents.body: On-ear wireless headphones with JBL Pure Bass Sound. 40 hours battery life. Hands-free calls with voice assistant support. Foldable design.

documents.title: Jabra Elite 4 Active Wireless Earbuds
documents.body: Active noise cancellation with HearThrough mode. IP57 dust and water resistant. 28 hours total battery. Mono earbud mode. 6 microphones for clear calls.

documents.title: Earbuds Earbuds Earbuds Wireless Bluetooth Sport Earbuds
documents.body: Earbuds earbuds earbuds sport fitness earbuds wireless earbuds earbuds for gym earbuds earbuds running earbuds earbuds earbuds bluetooth earbuds earbuds earbuds.

documents.title: Bluetooth Speaker Portable Waterproof
documents.body: 360 degree surround sound. IPX7 waterproof rating. 12 hours playtime. USB-C charging. Pairs with smartphones and tablets.

documents.title: USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Adapter
documents.body: Connect wired headphones or earbuds to USB-C devices. DAC chip for clean audio output. Compatible with Android smartphones and laptops.

documents.title: Noise Cancelling Earplugs for Sleeping
documents.body: High fidelity foam earplugs for sleep, travel, and concerts. SNR 35dB noise reduction. Reusable washable material. Pack of 10 pairs.

documents.title: Philips TAT3508 True Wireless Earbuds with Active Noise Cancelling
documents.body: True wireless earbuds with hybrid active noise cancellation. 9mm drivers. IPX4 splash resistant. 27 hours total battery with charging case. Voice assistant compatible.
